text.autoconfig.unboundle.title: Unboundle
text.autoconfig.unboundle.option.rows.to: Controls how many rows of items
appear in the bundle tooltip inside GUIs.
text.autoconfig.unboundle.option.columns: Controls how many columns of items
appear in the bundle tooltip inside GUIs.
text.autoconfig.unboundle.option.randomi: Controls whether items will be used
out of the bundle in a random order.
Comes with an optional key bind.
text.autoconfig.unboundle.option.ClickBe: Controls how left and right click interact
with the bundle and its contents in GUIs.
